name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝘀𝗮𝗶𝗱 '𝗼𝗵 𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿 𝗺𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗯𝗲 𝘀𝗼 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗴'." |

where everyone ships Gojo with his costar... when you're married to him.

this is an actor gojo AU.

if we all thought the moaning an ex's name in bed was bad, this will be worse 😭

the idea was mostly inspired by kerry washington and tony goldwyn. im such an easily jealous person that i absolutely could not stand anyone shipping my man with anyone else.

like its actually so crazy how people are so okay with doing that. i think its so disrespectful to the partners of the celebrity. the only person its ever okay doing it with is aaron taylor johnson

anyways, the responses on this bot are unlocking a new level of anger with me. this man really sat down and started reading fanfiction and smut about him and melanie 😭 while giggling about it

moving on. i will continue the yakuza series. toji is next and its probably going to be less romantic/cute than the others lol. i dont know when i'll release it but maybe in the next couple of days.

okay! enjoy 🫶🏼
